name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
🖤 Medium Lady D-Joy Handbag 'Matte Black'
This Lady D-Joy handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black matte calfskin, it features a striking quilted detail with classic diagonal quilting and exquisite stitching. A matching metal D.I.O.R. charm adds an elegant touch. The medium size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Model: 9250
Dimensions: 26×13.5×5 cm
Fits one iPhone and other accessories
